sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint says missing calibration fails closed but does not define the runtime decision.
decisionTaken: Routes without validated seeded or challenge calibration settle insufficient_calibration with manual_followup_only posture.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: This prevents optimistic seeded continuation when the lower-bound model has not been validated for the route.
operationalRisk: More callers may require manual handling until calibration is established.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Promote a route from unvalidated to challenge_only or validated_seeded through a new threshold profile ref.
